content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a scaffold to unify multiple conflicting perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data. This pipeline works by prompting the LLM to generate inconsistent critical perspectives on its own initial output in each iteration, then uses Self-Refine's iterative feedback loop to integrate these perspectives into a progressively improved output.
